entries.name: Acorn Pixie

attacks.name: Sharp Needle
attacks.text: This attack deals 5 extra damage against slow targets.

attacks.name: Entangle
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 5 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers slow.

skills.name: Heal
skills.text: 10 × T MP · Up to three creatures · Instantaneous. Each target recovers 40 Hit Points (50 if level 20+, 60 if level 40+).

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The acorn pixie is immune to poisoned.

skills.name: Flying
skills.text: See page 307 for the detailed effects of this Skill.

entries.text: These fairies gather in places where life force flows untainted. If said energy becomes corrupted, their minds may grow clouded by rage.

entries.name: Chaos Shard

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The chaos shard is immune to poisoned.

skills.name: Empty Mind
skills.text: The chaos shard is immune to dazed, enraged, and shaken.

entries.text: A fragment of negative energy given form. It is largely mindless, generally feeding on decaying matter and residual arcane energy.

entries.name: Grenado

attacks.name: Flame Belch
attacks.text: The target loses Resistance to fire damage until the end of the grenado's next turn.

skills.name: Detonation
skills.text: When reduced to 0 HP, the grenado explodes dealing minor (10) fire damage to every other creature on the scene. If reduced to 0 Hit Points by ice damage, the grenado will not explode.

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The grenado is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: Born in proximity to wildfires or industrial furnaces, these unstable elementals embody the more destructive qualities of fire.

entries.name: Static Ooze

attacks.name: Static Wave
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers 【HR + 15】 bolt damage and suffers slow.

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The static ooze is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: These creatures are often created by magitech scientists and wizards — they are little more than slimy magical batteries.

entries.name: Nymph

attacks.name: Seasonal Touch
attacks.text: Creatures hit by this attack suffer a status effect based on the current season: dazed during spring, shaken during winter, slow during autumn, and weak during summer.

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The nymph is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: These spirits dwell within woods, lakes, mountains, and rivers. While generally peaceful, they will fiercely defend their dwellings.

entries.name: Spikeflake

attacks.name: Frost Breath
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers 【HR + 15】 ice damage and suffers weak.

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The spikeflake is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: Frost spikes rise and fall from the surface of these barrel-sized spheres of pure winter magic.

entries.name: Cragboar

attacks.name: Rock Charge
attacks.text: This attack has multi (2). If this attack misses any of its targets, the cragboar loses a minor amount (20) of Hit Points.

attacks.name: Rock Barrage
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers 【HR + 20】 earth damage and suffers dazed.

attacks.name: Terra
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 10 × T MP · Up to three creatures · Instantaneous. Each target suffers 【HR + 20】 earth damage. This spell cannot target creatures who are flying, floating, falling, or otherwise in mid-air. Opportunity: Each target performs one fewer action on their next turn (to a minimum of 0 actions).

skills.name: Angry Snort
skills.text: On its next turn, the cragboar must perform Stone Charge, and each target hit by that attack will suffer shaken.

skills.name: Elemental
skills.text: The cragboar is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: A huge rock formation awakened by earth spirits. It may lay motionless for centuries, then suddenly rise and sow destruction.
